title: astraea divaricata
intro: Astraea divaricata, also known as the Starflower or Silver-leaved Asters, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Astraea divaricata include reducing inflammation, soothing coughs, and providing relief from congestion. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried flower infusion for its herbal benefits, although its effectiveness and safety should be confirmed through further research and consultation with a healthcare professional.
